title: Operators Only! Continued
description: Server-side mod that allows toggling whether only operators can join
body:
# [Operators Only!](https://modrinth.com/mod/operators-only!) Continued

A fork of [Operators Only!](https://modrinth.com/mod/operators-only!) with support for localization and newer versions of the game.

A simple lightweight mod for controlling access to your server when doing maintenance or setup!
- Easily toggle operators-only mode with `/opsonly`
- Lets you keep the server open just for operators when needed
- Shows a clear message to anyone who can’t join due to their non-operator status
- Server-side only, nothing required on clients

## Usage
Enable operators-only mode
```
/opsonly on
```

Disable operators-only mode
```
/opsonly off
```

Check if operators-only mode is on
```
/opsonly status
```
